case_title: ROY E HUDSON VS. MICHAEL COREA

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HODGSON, ROY E. AS TO DEFENDANT COREA, MICHAEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HODGSON, ROY E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COREA, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1030 PERSIA AVE.,(UPPER LEVEL LAST BEDROOM ON THE RIGHT), CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HODGSON, ROY E. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HODGSON, ROY E. SERVED FEB-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COREA, MICHAEL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COREA, MICHAEL
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HODGSON, ROY E. AS TO DEFENDANT COREA, MICHAEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $20.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HODGSON, ROY E.
